kobeRed:ComboStrike.NAME: Combo Strike
kobeRed:ComboStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Play the top !M! *Strikes from your draw pile.

kobeRed:Incinerate.NAME: Incinerate
kobeRed:Incinerate.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Choose 1 of the !M! top cards of your draw pile to Exhaust.

kobeRed:Seize.NAME: Seize
kobeRed:Seize.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Choose 1 of !M! non-Red Rare cards to add on top of your draw pile. Exhaust.

kobeRed:Infect.NAME: Infect
kobeRed:Infect.DESCRIPTION: Add a *Void into your hand. NL Deal !D! damage for each unique Status in your kobered:Deck.

kobeRed:Traumatize.NAME: Traumatize
kobeRed:Traumatize.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Add 1 *Flashback on top of your draw pile.

kobeRed:ArmorOfPain.NAME: Armor of Pain
kobeRed:ArmorOfPain.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL The next time you are attacked this turn, lose !M! HP.

kobeRed:Bloodbath.NAME: Bloodbath
kobeRed:Bloodbath.DESCRIPTION: Add !kobeRed:SecondMagic! *Slimed into your hand. NL Gain [R] [R]. NL Exhaust.
kobeRed:Bloodbath.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Add !kobeRed:SecondMagic! *Slimed into your hand. NL Gain [R] [R] [R]. NL Exhaust.

kobeRed:Bravado.NAME: Bravado
kobeRed:Bravado.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust a card. NL If it is Upgraded, gain !M! Strength.

kobeRed:Cautery.NAME: Cautery
kobeRed:Cautery.DESCRIPTION: Add a *Burn+ on top of your draw pile. NL Gain !M! Regen. NL Exhaust.

kobeRed:Defiance.NAME: Defiance
kobeRed:Defiance.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Gain !M! additional Block for each enemy intending to attack.

kobeRed:Hotheaded.NAME: Hotheaded
kobeRed:Hotheaded.DESCRIPTION: Draw up to !kobeRed:SecondMagic! cards until their total cost reaches !M!.
kobeRed:Hotheaded.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Draw cards until their total cost reaches !M!.

kobeRed:Parry.NAME: Parry
kobeRed:Parry.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Return !M! random Attack from your discard pile to your hand.
kobeRed:Parry.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Return !M! random Attacks from your discard pile to your hand.

kobeRed:CriticalHit.NAME: Critical Hit
kobeRed:CriticalHit.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you would deal !kobeRed:SecondMagic! attack damage or more, increase it by !M!.

kobeRed:PowerTrip.NAME: Power Trip
kobeRed:PowerTrip.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain !M! Vigor.

kobeRed:ScabScales.NAME: Scab Scales
kobeRed:ScabScales.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you lose HP, gain !M! Block.
kobeRed:ScabScales.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL Whenever you lose HP, gain !M! Block.

kobeRed:Flashback.NAME: Flashback
kobeRed:Flashback.DESCRIPTION: Retain. NL Apply !M! Weak. NL Apply !M! Vulnerable. NL Exhaust.
